_comment: Single source of truth for the accepted SWTools runtime artifact hashes. Current accepted package: releases/1.1.2/SWTools-1.1.2-Setup.exe, setup sha256 1c226e3eb4b2f4922d73465602818a89d7be496c5a45c328a79ab525930493db. Both scripts/verify_release_package.ps1 and scripts/sw_test_preflight.ps1 load their default expected hashes from this file. Update here when the accepted build changes.
